source.name: Chapter 1.4: 1.4 Test Your Knowledge - multiple slots
source.instructions: **What do we mean by "multiple slots" in Level 4?**

answers.answer: Multiple flows that each collect one slot
Several memory variables (e.g. amount, recipient, account_from) that the agent can collect and use together in one flow
Multiple actions that each read one slot
Several response messages for the same slot

source.learningObjectives: SWBAT define multiple slots in Level 4
source.guidance: Multiple slots are several memory variables the agent collects in one conversation and can use together (e.g. in one action).
